meta.title: SAPIRO - General Knowledge Quiz
meta.description: Learn flags, capitals and historical figures while having fun! Educational app for children and adults.

hero.title: Learn while having fun!
hero.subtitle: Discover world flags, capitals and historical figures through fun and educational quizzes.

features.title: Quizzes for everyone
features.subtitle: A complete and entertaining learning experience

items.title: Flag Quiz
items.description: Identify countries from their flags. 195 countries to discover!

items.title: Capital Quiz
items.description: Find the capital of each country. Test your geography knowledge!

items.title: Historical Figures
items.description: Recognize great historical figures from their portraits.

items.title: Explore by Continent
items.description: Explore the world region by region: Europe, Asia, Africa, Americas, Oceania.

items.title: Survival Mode
items.description: 3 lives, no mistakes allowed! How far will you go?

items.title: Badges & Achievements
items.description: Unlock badges as you progress. Collect them all!

download.title: Ready to learn?
download.subtitle: Download SAPIRO for free and start your adventure!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At SAPIRO, we respect your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your data.

sections.title: Data Collection
sections.content: SAPIRO does not collect any personal data. All your progress data (scores, badges, statistics) are stored locally on your device.

sections.title: Cookies and Tracking
sections.content: We do not use any tracking cookies, analytics tools, or third-party data collection services. Your experience remains 100% private.

sections.title: Data Sharing
sections.content: Since we do not collect any data, we have nothing to share with third parties. Your information stays on your device.

sections.title: Children's Data
sections.content: SAPIRO is an educational application suitable for children. We do not collect any information about users, regardless of their age.

sections.title: Changes
sections.content: This policy may be updated. Changes will be posted on this page with a new update date.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For any questions about this policy, contact us via the contact form on our website.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: This End User License Agreement (EULA) is a legal agreement between you and SAPIRO for the use of the SAPIRO application.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By downloading, installing, or using the SAPIRO application, you agree to be bound by these terms of use. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the application.

sections.title: 2. License Grant
sections.content: SAPIRO grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the application on your Apple devices in accordance with the App Store usage rules. This license does not allow you to copy, modify, distribute, sell, or rent the application.

sections.title: 3. Restrictions
sections.content: You agree not to: (a) copy or modify the application; (b) attempt to decompile or reverse engineer the application; (c) remove any copyright or proprietary notices; (d) transfer the application to another person; (e) use the application in any unlawful or unauthorized manner.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content: The application, including all intellectual property rights therein, is and remains the property of SAPIRO. These terms do not grant you any intellectual property rights in the application.

sections.title: 5. Application Content
sections.content: SAPIRO is an educational application offering general knowledge quizzes. The content is provided for informational and educational purposes. We strive to ensure the accuracy of the information but do not guarantee that it is error-free.

sections.title: 6. Updates
sections.content: SAPIRO may release updates to the application. These updates may be required to continue using the application and are subject to these terms.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the extent permitted by law, SAPIRO shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the application.

sections.title: 8. Termination
sections.content: This license is effective until terminated. Your rights under this license will terminate automatically if you fail to comply with any of its terms. Upon termination, you must cease all use of the application.

sections.title: 9. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by French law. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France.

sections.title: 10. Contact
sections.content: For any questions regarding these terms of use, contact us via the contact form on our website.

sections.title: 11. Subscriptions and In-App Purchases
sections.content:
SAPIRO offers optional premium subscriptions that unlock additional features.

Available Plans

  • Monthly Subscription: $1.99 per month
  • Annual Subscription: $19.99 per year
  • Lifetime Purchase: $39.99 (one-time payment)

Billing Terms

Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account (for iOS) or Google Play account (for Android) upon confirmation of purchase.

Automatic Renewal

Monthly and annual subscriptions automatically renew. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period, at the current subscription rate.

Cancellation

You can cancel automatic renewal at any time, at least 24 hours before the end of the current period:

  • On iOS: Settings > [your name] > Subscriptions
  • On Android: Google Play Store > Menu > Subscriptions

Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period. You will retain access to premium features until that date.

Lifetime Purchase

The "Lifetime" option is a one-time purchase (not a subscription) that provides permanent access to all premium features, with no renewal or additional fees.

Free Trial

Any unused portion of a free trial period (if offered) will be forfeited when purchasing a subscription.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.intellectualPropertyText: All content on this website (texts, images, videos, logos, graphics, icons, etc.) is the exclusive property of Agence Debord or its partners and is protected by French and international intellectual property laws. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or adaptation of all or part of the website elements is prohibited without prior written authorization from Agence Debord.
legal.personalDataText: This website does not collect any personal data and does not use cookies.
